## About Digital Infrastructure

Welcome to the Digital Infrastructure Division at IIT Jammu! We are dedicated to building and maintaining a
secure, scalable, and innovative digital ecosystem that empowers our campus community and supports world-class
research and education.

Our mission is to enable seamless technology experiences by integrating next-generation networking, cloud
computing, and advanced software platforms. From robust campus connectivity to cutting-edge research tools, we
strive to create an environment where students, faculty, and researchers can innovate without boundaries.

Email: c3i@iitjammu.ac.in

Phone: 0191-2570280

## Our Divisions

### Data Center and Operations Management

### Software Development and Digital Platforms

## Contact Us

Note: New employees should report to the respective Establishment section first and feel free to visit the DI
office. At present, we cannot provide on-call support, request your cooperation in this regard. The staff is
available on working days during office hours.

All internal users are requested to use Help Desk in E-Governance with appropriate request type (C3I Labs /
Computer Hardware and Printing / Network / Printing Service / Software and Licenses).

## For any queries/suggestions/feedback

### Address

DI Office, IIT Jammu, Jagti, Nagrota, Jammu & Kashmir, India

### Email

c3i@iitjammu.ac.in

### Phone

0191-2570280

## Data Center and Operations Management

Our centralized data center supports research, learning, and enterprise services through scalable and secure
infrastructure.

## Key Services

1. **High-Performance Computing (HPC – Agastya)**: 82 Nodes
(72 CPU, 8 GPU, 2 Master), **256 TF compute**, with 70+ active
research users.
2. **Big Data Setup**: 12 Nodes (2 Name, 1 Login, 6 CPU, 3 GPU)
powering analytics and large-scale computations.
3. **Private Cloud**: 13 Nodes (2 Management, 3 Infra, 5 CPU, 3
GPU) with 70+ active VMs supporting flexible workloads.
4. **Compute Resources**: Centralized GPU/CPU clusters for AI, ML,
simulation, and research.
5. **Saral Ticketing System**: Streamlined support for IT requests
and incident resolution.
6. **Enterprise Printing**: 25+ networked printers (13 large, 12
small) with quota management.
7. **C3I Labs**: 180+ specialized systems for cybersecurity and
hardware/software experimentation.
8. **Help Desk & Complaint Management**: Centralized support
for hardware, software, and service issues.
9. **New Service Requests**: Internet, CCTV, and connectivity
provisioning.
10. **Inventory Management**: Tracking of laptops, computers, and
tablets for faculty/staff/students.

## Digital Infrastructure Divisions

Our institution is powered by a robust and modern IT ecosystem designed to support research, academics, and campus-wide services. The infrastructure combines high-performance computing, cloud scalability, secure connectivity, and advanced security protocols to enable innovation and seamless operations.

Our mission is to enable seamless technology experiences by integrating next-generation networking, cloud
computing, and advanced software platforms. From robust campus connectivity to cutting-edge research tools, we
strive to create an environment where students, faculty, and researchers can innovate without boundaries.

Phone: 0191-2570280

## Network Services and Automation

Our network backbone powers the digital ecosystem with high availability, automation, and end-to-end security.

## Key Services

1. **CCTV Surveillance**: 1500+ cameras campus-wide for safety,
monitoring, and evidence management.
2. **VOIP Telephony**: 400+ intercom extensions enabling seamless
voice communication.
3. **Access Control Systems**: 500+ smart devices with biometric,
RFID, and role-based authentication.
4. **Real-Time Monitoring**: Centralized dashboards for
**video walls, BMS, SCADA**, and critical alerts.
5. **Active & Passive Network**: 550+ Wi-Fi access points and
240+ switches for campus-wide connectivity.
6. **Firewall Protection**: Next-Generation Firewalls with
IPS/IDS, DNS security, and IoT isolation.
7. **E-mail & Mailing List Services**: Secure institutional
mailing with managed distribution lists.
8. **Network Services**: High-speed, redundant backbone with dual
1 Gbps ILL ensuring uninterrupted connectivity.

## Software Development and Digital Platforms

We build and maintain software solutions, portals, and applications for administration, governance, and
collaboration.

## Key Services

1. **Skill Development & Training**: Workshops and hands-on
sessions on new IT tools and technologies.
2. **Software Development**: Custom applications to meet
institutional needs. E-Governance: Automation of academic and administrative
workflows.
3. **Website Management**: Development, maintenance, and security
of institutional websites.
4. **API Integrations**: Seamless data exchange between internal
and external systems.
5. **Application Development**: Web, mobile, and cloud-native
applications for diverse use cases.
6. **Digital Portals**: Recruitment, intranet, research
collaboration, and academic portals.

## Our Team

At the Digital Infrastructure Division of IIT Jammu, our strength lies in our people. We are a diverse group of
technology enthusiasts, network engineers, cloud architects, and software developers committed to delivering
secure, scalable, and innovative digital solutions for the campus and beyond.

Our team collaborates across departments, combining technical expertise with creativity to enable world-class
education and research. Every member plays a crucial role in building and maintaining the infrastructure that
powers IIT Jammu’s digital ecosystem.

Email: c3i@iitjammu.ac.in

Phone: 0191-2570280
